# Ebb & Flow Massage Studio

> Clinical massage therapy in Downtown DC and Georgetown specializing in lymphatic drainage, oncology massage, and craniosacral therapy.

## About

Ebb & Flow is a clinical massage studio owned and operated by Natalie Gamble, a licensed massage therapist with advanced certifications in lymphatic drainage, oncology massage, and craniosacral therapy. Natalie sees clients at two locations in Washington, DC.

Natalie's credentials include: Licensed Massage Therapist (LMT), Certified Manual Lymphatic Drainage Therapist (CMLDT), Medical Massage Practitioner (MMP), and Craniosacral Therapist (CST).

## Locations

### Downtown DC
- Address: 910 17th Street NW, Suite 1020, Washington, DC 20006
- Inside the Yao Shan Center for Chinese Medicine
- Days: Wednesdays & Saturdays

### Georgetown / Glover Park
- Address: 2300 Wisconsin Ave NW, #400b, Washington, DC 20007
- Inside DC Acupuncture
- Days: Mondays, Tuesdays & Thursdays

## Hours

- Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (location varies by day)
- By appointment only

## Contact

- Phone: (850) 529-3740
- Email: nat@ebbandflowmassagestudio.com
- Website: https://www.ebbandflowmassagestudio.com

## Services

### Lymphatic Drainage

- **Manual Lymphatic Drainage (MLD):** Gentle technique to support fluid movement, reduce swelling, and promote recovery. Used for fluid retention, post-travel swelling, seasonal wellness, and general lymphatic maintenance. $150 per session.
- **Pre/Post-Operative Lymphatic Massage:** Lymphatic support before and after surgery to reduce swelling, support comfort, scar healing, and recovery. Requires provider approval. $150 per session.
- **Fertility and IVF Support Massage:** Gentle lymphatic work to support comfort during fertility treatments, including IVF. Helps with bloating, tenderness, and grounding. $150 per session.
- **Pregnancy and Postpartum Lymphatic Massage:** Lymphatic massage tailored for pregnancy-related swelling and postpartum recovery, including C-section scar tissue work with provider approval. $150 per session.
- **Lymphedema and Lipedema Management:** Ongoing massage support for people managing lymphedema or lipedema, focusing on heaviness, swelling, tenderness, and comfort. $150 per session.

### Oncology Massage

Safe, gentle massage adapted for people at any stage of cancer treatment, recovery, or survivorship. Natalie holds Tracy Walton's Oncology Massage certification. $130 per session.

### Craniosacral Therapy (CST)

Light-touch therapy working with the craniosacral system to support relaxation, nervous system regulation, and relief from tension patterns. $150 per session.
